message:
audit: diff audit batch 380 — 16 files from HEAD~20, all SOUND

Diff-audited all src/ changes in the last 20 commits:
- decoding.rs: cumulative symbol tracking fix
- encoding.rs: validate_config extraction for empty payloads
- grpc/health.rs: transient round-trip detection via watch versions
- grpc/client.rs: loopback-only transport enforcement
- server/shutdown.rs: monotonic phase transition (fetch_max)
- trace/*: Worker event kinds added consistently
- types/symbol*.rs: pattern-consistent changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
